data.title: Demand for European patents exceeds 200 000 for first time, confirming Europe's competitiveness as a global tech hub
data.description: The EPO Technology Dashboard 2025, formerly known as the Patent Index, has disclosed a formidable year for the European Patent Office with a surge in various technological domains including digital, AI, quantum, semiconductor, and battery sectors. Notably, the USA and Germany continue to lead as the top countries of origin for patents, while China has broken into the top three for the first time. Companies such as Samsung and Huawei are among the prominent contenders in the patent landscape.

data.title: Ouster Launches Stereolabs ZED X Nano: A Wrist-Mount Stereo Camera Built for Robotic Manipulation and Physical AI
data.description: In San Francisco, Ouster, Inc. (Nasdaq: OUST) unveiled the Stereolabs ZED X Nano, a wrist-mount stereo camera designed for Physical AI. This compact camera is ideal for robotic manipulation and high-speed data collection. Tailored for robotic arms, it is small, durable, and efficient. Ouster's release targets boosting imitation and reinforcement learning for manipulation tasks as robotics teams expand operations. This cutting-edge technology promises enhanced capabilities in the Physical AI field.

data.title: Marketing Architects Launches Mass Customizer to Balance Reach and Relevance on TV
data.description: In Minneapolis, a TV advertising agency called Marketing Architects has introduced a cutting-edge AI tool. This tool allows brands to personalize their TV commercials without the need for reshoots or manual alterations. This innovative technology streamlines the process of customizing TV creative content, potentially saving companies significant time and costs. It presents a new way for brands to efficiently tailor their advertising strategies to better resonate with their target audiences.

data.title: SRM Appoints Ian Povey to International Advisory Board
data.description: A recent announcement from SRM reveals the addition of Ian Povey to its International Advisory Board based in Memphis, Tennessee. Povey's appointment brings valuable expertise to the team, enhancing their global perspective.

data.title: Bitcoin remains stable at $70,000 amidst 8% surge in oil price due to US-Iran tensions and Strait of Hormuz blockade.
data.description: Bitcoin maintained its value at $70,000 by the end of the week as global markets responded to the breakdown in negotiations between the US and Iran, along with the blockade of the vital Strait of Hormuz.

data.title: Musician loses $420K in Bitcoin retirement fund to fake Ledger app, with 5.9 BTC sent to KuCoin deposit addresses.
data.description: According to blockchain investigator ZachXBT, Garrett Dutton's 5.9 Bitcoin has been successfully transferred to deposit locations linked to KuCoin.

data.title: Justin Sun criticizes WLFI for extended token lockups and lack of voter info; platform threatens lawsuit.
data.description: The WLFI platform faced backlash for imposing extended token lockup periods and failing to disclose essential details to voters, drawing criticism from the public.

data.title: American Innovators Network Builds Momentum for Little Tech with More Than 30 Partners and New Executive Director
data.description: The American Innovators Network (AIN), which advocates for small tech startups and entrepreneurs in the AI sector in the U.S., has appointed Jeremy Kudon as its new Executive Director. The organization also welcomed twenty-four new partner organizations, such as Slingshot AI and Doppel, increasing its size twofold within its inaugural year. As Congress discusses federal AI matters, AIN now represents a larger network of innovators in this space.
China's Foreign Minister: Strait of Hormuz blockade not in shared interests of international community - Xinhua

data.title: transcosmos and transcosmos online communications support Kumamoto City, Kumamoto Prefecture, in upgrading its LINE official account into a multilingual platform
data.description: In efforts to improve communication with citizens in foreign countries, transcosmos and transcosmos online communications introduced a new automated message translation feature on March 30, 2026. This feature, integrated into KANAMETO, operates on LINE-powered Government platforms, aiming to facilitate multilingual services and enhance global connectivity. This initiative is anticipated to significantly impact a wide range of users, enabling smoother interactions and more effective information dissemination across borders.

data.title: Senné Expands Its Greater Boston Team with New Agents
data.description: Senné, a Boston-based boutique residential real estate company, has recently expanded its presence in the New England region with new acquisitions in Seaport, Boston, Cambridge, Somerville, Arlington, and Belmont. These additions are set to enhance Senné's expertise in residential offerings and contribute to its growing footprint in the area. The expansion was announced on April 13, 2026, with significant developments in multiple key locations.

data.title: Phiusion Labs Inc. Announces Strategic Distribution Partnership with Proteos Biotech S.L. for PBSerum® in the United States and Canada
data.description: In Richmond Hill, Ontario, on April 13, 2026, Phiusion Labs Inc. revealed a new collaboration with Proteos Biotech S.L. to bring the PBSerum® product line to the United States and Canada. This partnership marks an important milestone for Phiusion Labs Inc. as they expand their distribution network and reach a wider market. PBSerum® will now be available to consumers in both countries thanks to this strategic agreement.

data.title: Prepaid Card Market to Reach $7.1 trillion, Globally, by 2035 at 7.5% CAGR: Allied Market Research
data.description: The prepaid card industry offers ease, safety, and financial adaptability to both consumers and businesses. This sector comprises various options like open-loop cards, closed-loop cards, payroll cards, gift cards, and travel cards, which are issued by banks, retailers, and fintech firms. The market is witnessing growth, with estimated global prepaid card transactions hitting over $3 trillion annually, demonstrating its increasing popularity and utility in the financial landscape.
